abstract: Our annual conference starts Friday. http://scala.bythebay.io Keynotes by Miles Sabin, Julie Pitt, and Jay Kreps. Three tracks, corresponding to the three intractable problems in Computer Science: -- Functional Programming ("Naming") -- Reactive Microservices ("Caching") -- Data Pipelines ("Off by One") Leaders in software engineering at scale: Twitter, IBM, Verizon, Salesforce, Uber, Criteo, Twilio, Credit Karma, Bloomberg, Databricks, Alluxio, MemSQL, Netflix. Innovative startups doing more with less. Four panels: -- Scaling Scala Teams -- Finagle/TwitterOSS Q&A -- Modern Architectures and Data Pipelines -- Future of Functional Programming Breakfast, lunch, happy hour, and unlimited coffee. Best networking at the fantastic Twitter venue. A few late bird tickets are left: use the code SFSPARK20 to get yours (while supplies last). See you on Friday!
event_title: Scalæ By the Bay 2016 begins Friday at Twitter HQ
title: Scalæ By the Bay 2016 begins Friday at Twitter HQ
